title: hierochloe pluriflora subsp. intermedia
intro: Hierochloe pluriflora subsp. intermedia is a subspecies of the sweet grass plant, native to New Zealand and commonly found in coastal areas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hierochloe pluriflora subsp. intermedia include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it beneficial for overall health and well-being. In traditional herbal medicine, Hierochloe pluriflora subsp. intermedia can be prepared into teas, tinctures, or infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized for a range of health issues.
